TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Aziz Ansari == kawas tay 1983, ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 2, Aziz Ansari, squliq na Bunge'. qyanux na sraral Aziz Ansari htagan beh sa ngkalolayco klunpiya. magal cingay ru blaq na biru. hiya ga mhtuw telibis hmyapas na mtzyaw. mrkays beh Bennettsville, South Carolina. pcyogun yaya nya ga pkita nbu sinsiy,yaba(Shoukath) nya ga semong kenkyu hbun ru gyus. srangi' 2014 kawas i Aziz Ansari ru McBroom. hopa kawas Ansari ga musa maki beh Muslim qasa. hga Ansari ga balq balay srangi,mhtuw telibi msqun mtzyaw. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: == aziz ans~ɕari == kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, aziz ans~ɕari, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. qjanux na s~ɕraral aziz ans~ɕari ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa ŋkalolajʦ~ʨo klunpija. maɣal ʦ~ʨiŋaj ru βlaq na βiru. ħija ɣa mħtuw teliβis~ɕ ħmjapas~ɕ na mtzjaw. mrkajs~ɕ βeħ βennetts~ɕ*ille, s~ɕoutħ ʦ~ʨarolina. pʦ~ʨjoɣun jaja nja ɣa pkita nβu s~ɕins~ɕij,jaβa(s~ɕħoukatħ) nja ɣa s~ɕemoŋ kenkju ħβun ru ɣjus~ɕ. s~ɕraŋiʔ **** kawas~ɕ i aziz ans~ɕari ru mʦ~ʨβroom. ħopa kawas~ɕ ans~ɕari ɣa mus~ɕa maki βeħ mus~ɕlim qas~ɕa. ħɣa ans~ɕari ɣa βalq βalaj s~ɕraŋi,mħtuw teliβi ms~ɕqun mtzjaw. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
S.FORM: == Aziz Ansari == kawas tay 1983, ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 2, Aziz Ansari, squliq na Bunge'. qyanux na sraral Aziz Ansari htagan beh sa ngkalolayco klunpiya. magal cingay ru blaq na biru. hiya ga mhtuw telibis hmyapas na mtzyaw. mrkays beh Bennettsville, South Carolina. pcyogun yaya nya ga pkita nbu sinsiy,yaba(Shoukath) nya ga semong kenkyu hbun ru gyus. srangi' 2014 kawas i Aziz Ansari ru McBroom. hopa kawas Ansari ga musa maki beh Muslim qasa. hga Ansari ga balq balay srangi,mhtuw telibi msqun mtzyaw. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: == aziz ans~ɕari == kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, aziz ans~ɕari, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. qjanux na s~ɕraral aziz ans~ɕari ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa ŋkalolajʦ~ʨo klunpija. maɣal ʦ~ʨiŋaj ru βlaq na βiru. ħija ɣa mħtuw teliβis~ɕ ħmjapas~ɕ na mtzjaw. mrkajs~ɕ βeħ βennetts~ɕ*ille, s~ɕoutħ ʦ~ʨarolina. pʦ~ʨjoɣun jaja nja ɣa pkita nβu s~ɕins~ɕij,jaβa(s~ɕħoukatħ) nja ɣa s~ɕemoŋ kenkju ħβun ru ɣjus~ɕ. s~ɕraŋiʔ **** kawas~ɕ i aziz ans~ɕari ru mʦ~ʨβroom. ħopa kawas~ɕ ans~ɕari ɣa mus~ɕa maki βeħ mus~ɕlim qas~ɕa. ħɣa ans~ɕari ɣa βalq βalaj s~ɕraŋi,mħtuw teliβi ms~ɕqun mtzjaw. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
